sum: BWS-FR Fixpack is a compilation of patches, originally intended for Big World Setup FR, but which can also be used independently.
no: BWS-FR Fixpack is a compilation of patches, originally intended for Big World Setup FR, but which can also be used independently.

co.n: Application des patches sur les mods contenus dans le dossier du jeu
co.no: Apply French translation patches to installed mods
Check for known French translation issues
